FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DrawList

Namespace
FluentGpu.Render
Assembly
FluentGpu.Render.dll

Flat POD command stream consumed by the RHI (SubmitDrawList). The slice grows a single contiguous buffer; the full engine uses double-buffered arenas + clean-span memcpy. SortKeys are recorded in parallel.

public sealed class DrawList

object
DrawList

FillRoundRectChecker(in RectF, in CornerRadius4, in ColorF, in ColorF, float, in Affine2D, float, ulong)

A checkerboard-filled rounded rect (Checker): square cellPx cells alternating fillA (even cells) and fillB (odd) — the ColorPicker alpha-lane / preview-swatch transparency pattern (WinUI CheckerSize = 4, ColorHelpers.cpp:9).

public void FillRoundRectChecker(in RectF rect, in CornerRadius4 radii, in ColorF fillA, in ColorF fillB, float cellPx, in Affine2D transform, float opacity, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

rect RectF
radii CornerRadius4
fillA ColorF
fillB ColorF
cellPx float
transform Affine2D
opacity float
sortKey ulong

Parameters

deviceRect RectF
sortKey ulong

PushClip(in RectF, ulong)

Push a tier-1 scissor clip (device-space, pre-intersected). Pair with PopClip(ulong).

public void PushClip(in RectF deviceRect, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

deviceRect RectF
sortKey ulong

PushClipRounded(in RectF, in RectF, float, ulong)

Push a tier-2 ROUNDED clip: the scissor still clamps to deviceRect, and RoundRect- pipeline primitives additionally clamp to the rounded-box SDF of (roundedRect, cornerRadius) — both device-space. Pair with PopClip(ulong). See ClipCmd for the honest coverage scope (RoundRect-pipeline primitives only).

public void PushClipRounded(in RectF deviceRect, in RectF roundedRect, float cornerRadius, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

deviceRect RectF
roundedRect RectF
cornerRadius float
sortKey ulong

PushLayer(in RectF, in CornerRadius4, in ColorF, in ColorF, float, float, float, float, ulong) 

public void PushLayer(in RectF deviceRect, in CornerRadius4 radii, in ColorF tint, in ColorF fallback, float tintOpacity, float blurSigma, float noiseOpacity, float luminosityOpacity, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

deviceRect RectF
radii CornerRadius4
tint ColorF
fallback ColorF
tintOpacity float
blurSigma float
noiseOpacity float
luminosityOpacity float
sortKey ulong

PushOpacityLayer(in RectF, in CornerRadius4, float, ulong)

Begin a FLAT opacity group (Opacity): everything until the matching PopLayer(in RectF, ulong) renders at full alpha offscreen and composites once at groupAlpha — WinUI Composition LayerVisual semantics (no double-blend of overlapping children). Subtree commands should be recorded with opacity relative to 1, NOT pre-multiplied by the group alpha.

public void PushOpacityLayer(in RectF deviceRect, in CornerRadius4 radii, float groupAlpha, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

deviceRect RectF
radii CornerRadius4
groupAlpha float
sortKey ulong

Reset() 

public void Reset()

StrokeRoundRect(in RectF, in CornerRadius4, in ColorF, float, in Affine2D, float, ulong)

Parameters

rect RectF
radii CornerRadius4
color ColorF
strokeWidth float
transform Affine2D
opacity float
sortKey ulong

StrokeRoundRectDashed(in RectF, in CornerRadius4, in ColorF, float, float, float, in Affine2D, float, ulong)

A DASHED SDF outline: the stroke band is modulated along the perimeter into dashOn-px dashes separated by dashOff-px gaps (clockwise from the top edge's left end). dashOn ≤ 0 falls back to a solid stroke.

public void StrokeRoundRectDashed(in RectF rect, in CornerRadius4 radii, in ColorF color, float strokeWidth, float dashOn, float dashOff, in Affine2D transform, float opacity, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

rect RectF
radii CornerRadius4
color ColorF
strokeWidth float
dashOn float
dashOff float
transform Affine2D
opacity float
sortKey ulong

TabShape(in RectF, float, float, in ColorF, in Affine2D, float, ulong)

The WinUI selected-tab shape (see DrawTabShapeCmd): rect is the FULL shape box including both bottom flares; the tab body is inset by flareRadius per side with topRadius top corners. WinUI values: topRadius = OverlayCornerRadius (8), flareRadius = 4 (TabViewItem.cpp:106).

public void TabShape(in RectF rect, float topRadius, float flareRadius, in ColorF fill, in Affine2D transform, float opacity, ulong sortKey = 0)

Parameters

rect RectF
topRadius float
flareRadius float
fill ColorF
transform Affine2D
opacity float
sortKey ulong
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
